title: Utility schema
description: This schema defines the part of the Service Description that contains abstract classes for use by other classes.

id.description: A unique identifier that references a node within a taxonomy.

source.description: The Web location where a copy of the taxonomy can be obtained.

organization.description: A unique framework of authority within which a person or persons act, or are designated to act, towards some purpose. Any department, service, or other entity within an organization which needs to be identified for information exchange.

id.description: A unique identifier that is used to designate or identify the organization.

name.description: The full name (and acronym, if any) of the organization.

point-of-contact.description: A person or group within an organization, suitable for making a human contact for any purpose.

name.description: The name of the point of contact.

function.description: A designation of the position or responsibilities of the point of contact.

phone-number.description: A telephone number used to communicate orally with the point of contact.

email.description: An email address used to correspond with the point of contact.

document.description: Any medium with information recorded on or in it.

id.description: The unique persistent identifier assigned to the document.

title.description: The name by which the document is formally known.

publisher.description: The entity responsible for making the document available.

date-issued.description: The date of formal issuance (e.g., publication) of the document.

version.description: The current version or revision level of the document.

location.description: The address or Web location where a copy of the document can be obtained.

enumeration.description: A listing of possible values for an attribute.

value.description: One of the enumeration’s listed values.
